description_long: This object is a classic rectangular record player with a low-profile, boxy form and four short feet at the corners. The top surface features a prominent circular platter, likely made of metal or plastic, which is slightly recessed into the body. A long, straight tonearm extends from one side, with a visible pivot and a cartridge at the end, positioned above the platter. There are a few small control knobs or buttons on the top surface, likely for power and playback control, and a cylindrical component on one side that may be a speed selector or power switch. The exterior appears to be constructed from a combination of plastic and metal, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. No dust cover is visible, leaving the platter and tonearm exposed.
description: A rectangular, low-profile record player with a visible platter, tonearm, and control knobs, featuring a matte plastic and metal exterior.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat rectangular body, short feet, and a small control knob on the top right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tonearm extending forward and the platter's edge, with the tonearm's pivot visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the platter, tonearm base, and a cluster of controls or connectors on the top right.
description_view_3: Rear view with a cylindrical component protruding, possibly a power or audio connector, and a small knob on the top left.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and occupies a significant portion of the top surface. It appears to be made of metal or plastic, with a smooth, slightly recessed design. No grooves or decorative patterns are visible, and the color is a dark gray or black with a matte finish.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, straight, and extends from one side of the record player toward the center of the platter. It is of medium length, with a visible pivot mechanism at the base. The material appears to be metal or plastic, colored black, and the finish is matte. The tonearm is resting above the platter.
attribute_control_knobs: There are a few small control knobs or buttons on the top surface, primarily located near the corners. They are round, made of plastic or metal, and colored black or gray. No visible labels or markings are present.
